email_text: Hope you're well. toaster stopped working after 2 days. Appreciate your help.

Order ORD-76237. I ordered a camping tent and received something completely different. The SKU on the product doesn't match the SKU on my invoice. I haven't opened anything beyond the outer packaging. I'd like a refund and I don't want to deal with shipping a replacement because the last two orders had issues too. Please confirm.
This is unacceptable. The bedding set was supposed to arrive by about 1 weeks ago but came 10 days late. I no longer need it. I expect a prompt resolution.

Hope you're well. Order ORD-54118, received 9 days ago. The ceramic bowl set is missing screws and the assembly wrench. Without these parts I literally cannot use the product. I checked the packaging twice, contacted a friend who owns the same model to confirm, and my box is incomplete. Either send the missing parts within 2 days or refund the full amount. Appreciate your help.

I bought the blender assuming it would work with my existing setup. The product description implied broad compatibility but in practice it only works with a specific adapter which I don't own and don't plan to buy. This wasn't clear from the listing. I feel the description was misleading and I'd like a refund.
I'm not sure how to handle this. bedding set quality is poor. Let me know what to do.
I no longer want the camping tent I ordered 8 days ago. Refund please.

Hope you're well. Bought the toaster from you 250 days ago. It failed last week. The manufacturer warranty is theoretically active but they're not responding to my support tickets. As the seller, can you process a refund and handle the warranty claim yourselves? I've attached photos and the failure mode is clearly covered under warranty terms. Appreciate your help.
This is unacceptable. tablet doesn't fit. I expect a prompt resolution.

This is unacceptable. I received my winter jacket on 5 days ago and when I opened the box the product was visibly damaged. There's a crack running along one side and the packaging looked tampered with. I'd like a refund please. I expect a prompt resolution.

I'm not sure how to handle this. I bought a espresso machine 14 days ago and it worked for a while but now it's completely unresponsive. I've tried resetting, different outlets, and the steps in the manual. Nothing works. This seems like a manufacturing defect. I'd like a refund. Let me know what to do.

I'm not sure how to handle this. Order ORD-42325. I ordered a wireless headphones and received something completely different. The SKU on the product doesn't match the SKU on my invoice. I haven't opened anything beyond the outer packaging. I'd like a refund and I don't want to deal with shipping a replacement because the last two orders had issues too. Please confirm. Let me know what to do.

This is unacceptable. I placed order ORD-28131 specifically because of the delivery guarantee. The camping tent was supposed to arrive about 1 weeks ago but actually arrived 10 days late. Because of this delay I had to buy backup supplies elsewhere for my home project. I don't want the product anymore and I'd like a full refund including the expedited shipping fee I paid. I expect a prompt resolution.
blender came with missing parts.

This is unacceptable. I bought the winter jacket assuming it would work with my existing setup. I'd prefer a refund over a replacement because I need the money for an alternative. Please resolve this quickly.
